name: HPV58_full_genome
description: HPV58 complete circular dsDNA genome, ~7824 bp, high-risk mucosal HPV in species alpha-9. Genes: E6, E7, E1, E2, E4, E5, L2, L1 plus the LCR/URR. Epidemiology: ~3% cervical cancers; higher in East Asia. Stable circular episome at low copy per basal keratinocyte; rolling-circle amplification in upper-layer differentiated cells; integration into host chromosome is the principal step toward malignant progression and typically disrupts E2 while preserving E6/E7.
expected_copy_count: 10-100 episomal copies per basal keratinocyte; thousands in productive lesions; variable integrated copies in carcinoma
